---
title: "ami_data_analysis"
author: "Epidemiology group"
date: "2026-05-19"
output: html_document
---

## Installing the libraries

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
.libPaths("library")
library(readxl)
library(epiR)
library(Epi)
library(popEpi)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(AER)
library(MASS)
library(survival)
library(tidyverse)
library(pmsampsize)
library(psych)
library(corrplot)
```

## Accessing the dataset

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
ami_data <- read_excel('./AMI_data.xlsx')
head(ami_data)
```
## Question 1

Start with an initial data analysis, comparing patients dead versus patients alive at 30 days. Insert also a column with the total population descriptive statistics. Include also a new variable, the Body Mass Index.

### BMI

```{r bmi}
ami_data$BMI <- ami_data$wei/ami_data$hei
```
